achievements.title: I'm Ready
achievements.desc: Clock in at precisely the correct time.

achievements.title: Expedited Egress
achievements.desc: Clock out as soon as you can without reprimand.

achievements.title: After Dark
achievements.desc: Contact coworkers while off the clock.

achievements.title: Crazy Train
achievements.desc: Complete a full cart of freight.

achievements.title: Going Off The Rails
achievements.desc: Work freight for an entire shift.

achievements.title: Boss Makes A Dollar...
achievements.desc: Head to Waste Management on company time.

achievements.title: Oops...
achievements.desc: Swear in front of a customer.

achievements.title: Sentient Directory
achievements.desc: Guide a customer to a product.

achievements.title: You Can Pick Your Friends, You Can Pick Your Nose
Ruined Potential
achievements.desc: Accidentally destroy a product, to such a degree that it requires disposal.

achievements.title: Kit & Kaboodle
achievements.desc: Find an entire box of unsellable product.

achievements.title: NotMyFault
achievements.desc: Make a mistake on a customer's order.

achievements.title: Blood Money
achievements.desc: Break skin while on the clock.

achievements.title: [Leonardo DiCaprio Pointing Meme]
achievements.desc: Recognize a meme song on thestore radio.

achievements.title: Unauthorized Asset Reistribution
achievements.desc: Take equipment that was in use.

achievements.title: Tactical Reload
achievements.desc: Swap label rolls before the current roll is depleted.

achievements.title: Ammunition Depleted
achievements.desc: Fully expend a roll of labels.

achievements.title: That's a Wrap
achievements.desc: Complete an entire round of daily production (Wraps & Pinwheels)

achievements.title: Retail.
achievements.desc: Have a breakdown on the clock.

achievements.title: Friends With- Not That Kind!
achievements.desc: Complete a personal favor for a coworker.

achievements.title: Cyclical Nature
achievements.desc: Buy something from your own workplace.

achievements.title: Gossip Girls
achievements.desc: Talk about a coworker behind their back.

achievements.title: Overstock Bonus
achievements.desc: Add more product to a shelf than designated by cap.

achievements.title: Self-Sabotage
achievements.desc: Place an item in the incorrect place

achievements.title: Rightful Place
achievements.desc: Bring an item back to where it's supposed to go.

achievements.title: Overextension
achievements.desc: Take care of something that is not your department's responsibility.

achievements.title: Fully Certified
achievements.desc: Complete all required training for your position.

achievements.title: Hello, Operator?
achievements.desc: Take a call for the company.

achievements.title: Week To Week / Cheek To Cheek / Us Assholes Stick Together
achievements.desc: Refuse to report a coworker for breaking the rules.

achievements.title: Live External Communications
achievements.desc: Join a voice call while on the clock.

achievements.title: Nope.
achievements.desc: Discover mold infesting the building itself

achievements.title: Abandonment
achievements.desc: Use (P)PTO to leave before you're scheduled to clock out.

achievements.title: Presence Unknown
achievements.desc: Fail to work without reporting yourself absent.

achievements.title: Advance Notice
achievements.desc: Report yourself absent, and stay home.

achievements.title: Harmful Redundancy
achievements.desc: Mark yourself absent, and show up anyways.

achievements.title: Snitches Get Stitches
achievements.desc: Refuse to tell which coworker is responsible for a mistake.

achievements.title: No Sense Crying
achievements.desc: Spill product on the sales floor.

achievements.title: Regret
achievements.desc: Go on lunch break without any money for lunch.

achievements.title: Hostile Equipment
achievements.desc: Burn yourself with the rotisserie oven.

achievements.title: Sweet Dreams
achievements.desc: Sleep past the time you were due to clock in.

achievements.title: Caught in 4k
achievements.desc: Get recorded doing something illicit on camera.

achievements.title: Scheduling Conflict
achievements.desc: Work a day you weren't supposed to.

achievements.title: May I Have Your Attention Please?
achievements.desc: Make an announcement over the store's PA system.

achievements.title: I'm In
achievements.desc: Tap into store radio communications with an unauthorized device.

achievements.title: In The Bathed Room
achievements.desc: straijt up jorkin it. and by it, well, lets just say.

achievements.title: I Didn't See Nothin'
achievements.desc: Catch someone shoplifting, and let them go.

achievements.title: Temporal Obsession
achievements.desc: Have every punch in one day be precisely on time.

achievements.title: My God, What Are You Doing?
achievements.desc: Explode something in the breakroom microwave.

achievements.title: Extended Relaxation
achievements.desc: Accumulate a full year of PTO.

achievements.title: Unorthodox Request
achievements.desc: Request a full year off of work.

achievements.title: Poor Choice
achievements.desc: Become a salaried member of management.

achievements.title: Not (Supposed To Be) My Problem
achievements.desc: Get pulled to a different department.

achievements.title: Unfortunate
achievements.desc: Drop open food on the floor.

achievements.title: When I Ripped My Pants
achievements.desc: Ruin an article of clothing at work

achievements.title: General Odor
achievements.desc: Get called out for smelling like pot.

achievements.title: Don't You Dare.
achievements.desc: Ride the scissor lift without authorization.

achievements.title: Disclaimer
achievements.desc: Achievements listed do not necessarily reflect real world occurances. There is no intention of executing any actions listed. This page is satirical in nature and in no way reflects employee practices.
